para_trans: Maharashtra Education Service (Administrative Branch)
Administrative of officers in Group-A
Transfer for Reason - Deputy Director of Education
and similar
Government of Maharashtra
Department of School Education and Sports
Government Order No: Transfer-3126 / E-Office 1345060 / PRASH-2
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032
Date: 16th March, 2026
Government Orders: -
Regulation of transfers and discharge of government duties of Maharashtra Government employees
Section 4 (4) (ii) of the Prevention of Delay in Dismantling Act, 2005 and
As per the provision in Section 4 (5), the officers mentioned in the table below shall have a column in front of their name.
The position indicated in No. 4 is being replaced by an administrative position.
The said orders are being issued with the approval of the competent authority.
Officers transferred by this order by the Commissioner (Education), Maharashtra State, Pune.
Ensure that they join the given position within the prescribed time period and
The report should be submitted to the government.
